system.description:
The psyker peels back the layers of another's mind. Takes 5 Rounds of sustained effort. Each Round the psyker must win an Opposed Willpower Test, digging successively deeper: Round 1 = contact (name, mood, IP, physical health); Round 2 = surface thoughts (uppermost fears, conscious lies, CP); Round 3 = short-term memory (last 12 hours, simple passwords); Round 4 = subconscious (beliefs, motivations, contacts, pivotal memories); Round 5 = broken (full access, can identify implanted memories). A failed Opposed Test ends the probe and inflicts 1 Fatigue per DoF. The target is always aware their mind is being plundered.

Focus Power Test: Opposed Willpower

XP Cost: 200
